content: Phishing SMS campaign in East Park is impersonating City Utility billing and asking for card verification through a fake link.
Officials warn of phishing texts in East Park pretending to be City Utility billing support with fake verification links.
Got a phishing SMS in East Park from fake City Utility billing asking card verification on a suspicious link.
Another wave of phishing SMS in East Park is using fake City Utility billing links for card verification.
Internet outage reported in Lakeside after fiber cable damage near the metro corridor.
No internet in Lakeside since morning after fiber cable damage near the metro corridor.
Scam callers in Old Town are impersonating police and demanding urgent payment through gift cards.
Caller pretending to be police in Old Town asked for urgent payment using gift cards.
Downtown hospital systems are offline after a ransomware attack was reported.
Ransomware incident confirmed at Downtown hospital with critical systems temporarily offline.
Flood warning issued for Riverbank low-lying roads due to heavy rainfall and rising water levels.
Riverbank low-lying roads are flooding after heavy rainfall and rising water levels.
Fake courier SMS across Citywide asks users to pay customs charges through suspicious payment links.
Received fake courier SMS asking customs payment from a suspicious link across Citywide.
Power outage in South Ridge after transformer failure and restoration work is in progress.
South Ridge has a power outage after transformer failure and restoration teams are working.
Credential stuffing attempts detected on city education portal affecting student accounts.
Water supply disruption announced in Central Market due to pipeline repair this afternoon.
Tax refund phishing emails are circulating and asking users to submit bank login details.
Industrial Area has a major power outage and factories switched to backup systems.
Central Market water supply disruption continues due to pipeline repair work this afternoon.
Database misconfiguration exposed internal records at a startup in Tech Park.
University Area students report credential stuffing style login attempts on the city education portal.
Advisory issued to avoid non-essential travel in North Block due to severe waterlogging.
Citywide advisory warns about tax refund phishing emails requesting bank login details.
